mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_binding ( user_id, device_id, device_code, device_name, tenant_id, status, bound_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '0', #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device_binding SET status = 'active', unbound_at = NULL, del_flag = '0', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE binding_id = #{bindingId}
